app.name: DishDice
app.tagline: Roll the dice on your weekly meals!

auth.createAccount: Create your account and start planning!

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

preferences.title: Your Food Preferences
preferences.description: Tell us about your dietary preferences, favorite cuisines, and any restrictions. This helps us generate personalized meal plans just for you!
preferences.placeholder: Example: I love Italian food and prefer vegetarian meals. I'm allergic to shellfish and don't like spicy food. We enjoy trying new recipes but keep it family-friendly.

tips.title: Tips:
tips.restrictions: Mention dietary restrictions (vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, etc.)
tips.cuisines: List favorite cuisines (Italian, Mexican, Asian, etc.)
tips.cookingStyle: Specify if you prefer quick meals or enjoy cooking

dashboard.title: Your Meal Plans
dashboard.subtitle: Create and manage your weekly meal proposals
dashboard.getStarted: Get started by creating your first weekly meal proposal
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this proposal?

proposal.aiGenerate: Let AI generate a personalized weekly meal plan for you!
proposal.preferencesHint: Your dietary preferences and restrictions from your profile are always considered. Update them in
proposal.weekPreferencesPlaceholder: Example: I'd like lasagna on Friday, and something light for Monday and Tuesday
proposal.availableIngredientsPlaceholder: Example: I have gouda cheese, fresh salad mix, carrots, and chicken breast in the fridge
proposal.ingredientsHint: List ingredients you'd like to use this week. AI will try to incorporate them!
proposal.selectDate: Please select a week start date
proposal.alreadyExists: A meal plan already exists for this week. You can regenerate individual days in the plan, or delete and create a new one.
proposal.allAddedToShopping: All meals added to shopping list!
proposal.addToShoppingFailed: Failed to add to shopping list

meal.addToShoppingFailed: Failed to add to shopping list

shopping.title: Shopping List
shopping.subtitle: Manage your grocery shopping items
shopping.emptyHint: Add items manually or from your meal plans
shopping.enterNameQuantity: Please enter item name and quantity
